testcase.name: adminAuditMiddleware > logs the completed admin action
adminAuthMiddleware > authenticate > should call next() when a valid access token is provided
adminAuthMiddleware > authenticate > should return 401 when no token is provided
adminAuthMiddleware > authenticate > should return 401 when the token is expired
adminAuthMiddleware > requireAdmin > should call next() when the user has an admin role
adminAuthMiddleware > requireAdmin > should return 403 when the user has a user role
adminAuthMiddleware > requireAdmin > should return 401 when req.user is not set
adminAuthMiddleware > requireSuperAdmin > should call next() when the user has a superadmin role
adminAuthMiddleware > requireSuperAdmin > should return 403 when the user has an admin role
aiController > improveTextHandler > should improve text and return the result
aiController > enhanceBulletHandler > should enhance a bullet point and return the result
aiErrorHandler > categorizeAiError > should categorize a 429 response as a rate-limit error
aiErrorHandler > categorizeAiError > should categorize a timeout as a timeout error
aiErrorHandler > categorizeAiError > should categorize a 401 response as an auth error
aiErrorHandler > categorizeAiError > should categorize a malformed response as a parse error
aiErrorHandler > handleAiError > should return a structured error response with the category
aiMetrics > trackAiRequest > should increment the request counter with provider and feature labels
aiMetrics > trackAiRequest > should record request duration
aiMetrics > trackAiFallback > should increment the fallback counter when provider switches
aiMetrics > trackAiTokens > should record token usage by model
aiUsageController > getAiUsageStats > should return aggregated usage stats for the authenticated user
aiUsageController > getAiUsageStats > should return zeros when the user has no AI usage
aiUsageController > getAiUsageStats > should return 401 when the user is not authenticated
aiUsageController > getAiRequestHistory > should return a paginated list of AI requests
aiUsageController > getAiRequestHistory > should return an empty array when there is no history
aiValidation > validateAiInput > should pass valid input
aiValidation > validateAiInput > should reject input exceeding the max length
aiValidation > validateAiInput > should accept input with no HTML sanitation (sanitizeAiInput only strips null bytes/newlines)
aiValidation > detectHallucinations > should return false when the response is consistent with the input
aiValidation > detectHallucinations > should return true when the response fabricates contact details
aiValidation > detectHallucinations > should return true when the response invents job history
alerting > alertComplianceIssue > should dispatch alerts to all configured channels
alerting > alertComplianceIssue > should throw when a channel is unreachable
alerting > alertSecurityIssue > should include severity and source IP in the alert payload
alerting > alertSecurityIssue > should send high-severity alerts immediately
alerting > alertDataIntegrityIssue > should include document IDs and collection names
apiVersionMiddleware > should set X-Service-Version from the config value
apiVersionMiddleware > should read x-api-version header and attach it to req
apiVersionMiddleware > should default to latest version when no header is present
authController > registerUser > should create a new user and return 201 when valid data is provided
authController > registerUser > should return 409 when email already exists
authController > registerUser > should return 400 when required fields are missing
authController > login > should return 200 when credentials are valid
authController > login > should return 401 when password is incorrect
authController > forgotPassword > should send a reset email when the email exists
authController > forgotPassword > should return 200 even when the email does not exist (to prevent enumeration)
authController > resetPassword > should update the password when a valid token is provided
authController > resetPassword > should return 400 when the token has expired
authController > googleLogin > should create a new user and return auth cookies when Google token is valid
authController > googleLogin > should return 400 when the Google token verification fails
authController > getCurrentUser > should return the authenticated user's profile
authController > getCurrentUser > should return 401 when no access token is present
authController > logout > should clear auth cookies and blacklist the refresh token
authController > logout > should not error when no cookies are present
authMiddleware > returns 401 when no access token cookie is present
authMiddleware > attaches the current user when the token is valid
authMiddleware > returns 401 when the user cannot be found
authMiddleware > returns 401 when token verification fails
BaseQueue > adds a job via updateOne with upsert
BaseQueue > polls for pending jobs and processes them
BaseQueue > retries failed jobs with exponential backoff
BaseQueue > marks job as failed after max attempts
BaseQueue > recoverPending calls updateMany on stuck jobs
complianceMetrics > trackAuditLogEntry > should increment the audit log counter with action labels
complianceMetrics > trackComplianceViolation > should increment the violation counter with violation type
complianceMetrics > trackOrphanedDocuments > should set the orphaned documents gauge
correlationIdMiddleware > should generate a correlation ID when none is provided
correlationIdMiddleware > should propagate a W3C traceparent header
correlationIdMiddleware > should set x-correlation-id and x-trace-id on the response
correlationIdMiddleware > should use an existing x-correlation-id header when present
creditDeductionMiddleware > should attach estimated credits to the request for valid operations
creditDeductionMiddleware > should return 0 credits for unknown operation types
creditDeductionMiddleware > should scale credit cost with input length
csrfProtection > allows safe methods without a token
csrfProtection > blocks unsafe requests with missing or mismatched tokens
csrfProtection > allows matching CSRF tokens
csrfProtection > requires CSRF token for logout route (state-changing — not exempt)
csrfProtection > allows logout with matching CSRF tokens
dataIntegrityService > checkReferentialIntegrity > should return no violations when all references are valid
dataIntegrityService > checkReferentialIntegrity > should detect orphaned resume references to deleted users
dataIntegrityService > checkReferentialIntegrity > should detect orphaned ATS analysis references to deleted resumes
dataIntegrityService > startPeriodicChecks > should run checks on the configured interval
dataIntegrityService > startPeriodicChecks > should not overlap concurrent runs
dataIntegrityService > stopPeriodicChecks > should clear the interval timer
db > should connect to MongoDB with the configured URI
db > should reject when the connection URI is invalid
db > should close the connection gracefully
defaultTemplates > ensureDefaultTemplatesInBackend > should insert default templates when the collection is empty
defaultTemplates > ensureDefaultTemplatesInBackend > should skip insertion when templates already exist
defaultTemplates > ensureDefaultTemplatesInBackend > should not error when a concurrent insert happens
defaultTemplates > ensureDefaultTemplatesInBackend > should create a bootstrap admin when no users exist
defaultTemplates > ensureDefaultTemplatesInBackend > should create a local bootstrap admin when credentials are provided
env configuration > should parse and validate all required environment variables
env configuration > should apply default values for optional variables
env configuration > should exit the process when a required variable is missing
testcase.system-err: Invalid environment configuration: - MONGO_URI: MONGO_URI is required - FRONTEND_URL: FRONTEND_URL must be a valid URL - JWT_ACCESS_SECRET: JWT_ACCESS_SECRET is required - JWT_REFRESH_SECRET: JWT_REFRESH_SECRET is required - GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID: GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID is required

testcase.name: env configuration > should reject invalid FRONTEND_URLS entries
testcase.system-err: Invalid environment configuration: - FRONTEND_URLS: Invalid URL in FRONTEND_URLS: not-a-url

testcase.name: errorHandler > notFoundHandler > should return 404 for unknown routes
errorHandler > notFoundHandler > should include the requested path in the error response
errorHandler > errorHandler > should return 500 for unhandled errors
errorHandler > errorHandler > should omit stack traces in production mode
indexes > createAllIndexes > should create indexes for all configured collections
indexes > createAllIndexes > should handle duplicate index errors gracefully

testcase.name: indexes > createAllIndexes > should create TTL indexes where configured
MFA backup code hashing > hashBackupCode produces a salted scrypt hash
MFA backup code hashing > same code produces different hashes each time
MFA backup code hashing > verifyBackupCode validates correct code
MFA backup code hashing > verifyBackupCode rejects incorrect code
MFA backup code hashing > verifyBackupCode returns false for malformed hash
mfaController > setupMfa > should generate a TOTP secret and return QR code URI
mfaController > setupMfa > should return 409 when MFA is already enabled
mfaController > verifyMfa > should return 401 when the TOTP code is invalid (real crypto)
mfaController > verifyMfa > should return 422 when the TOTP code is invalid
mfaController > verifyMfa > should return 401 when no user is authenticated
mfaController > disableMfa > should disable MFA when the correct password is provided
mfaController > disableMfa > should return 400 when MFA is not enabled
mfaController > getMfaStatus > should return whether MFA is enabled and which method
mfaController > getMfaStatus > should return 401 when not authenticated
observability > logger > should log messages at the configured level
observability > logger > should include service name and version in every log
observability > metricsMiddleware > should record request count and duration
observability > metricsMiddleware > should increment error count on failed requests
observability > metricsHandler > should expose Prometheus-formatted metrics
observability > metricsHandler > should include default Node.js metrics
openapi > should export a valid OpenAPI 3.0 specification
openapi > should include all API paths
openapi > should define all request and response schemas
redisCache > cache scopes are versioned
redisCache > invalidateRedisCache uses versioned cache patterns
redisRateLimit > should allow requests within the configured limit
redisRateLimit > should return 429 when the limit is exceeded
redisRateLimit > should include Retry-After headers on 429 responses
redisRateLimit > should use user ID when available, falling back to IP
redisRateLimit > should reset the window after the configured duration
referentialIntegrityMiddleware > findOrphanedDocuments > uses aggregation pipeline to avoid loading all parent IDs into memory
referentialIntegrityMiddleware > findOrphanedDocuments > returns empty array when no orphans exist
referentialIntegrityMiddleware > findOrphanedDocuments > returns empty array when model is not registered
referentialIntegrityMiddleware > should allow the request when all referenced documents exist
referentialIntegrityMiddleware > should return errors when a referenced document does not exist
referentialIntegrityMiddleware > should skip validation when referenced fields are not present in the data
referentialIntegrityMiddleware > should handle nested object references
refreshController > refreshAccessToken returns 401 when refresh token cookie is missing
refreshController > refreshAccessToken refreshes access cookie and returns csrf token for a valid refresh token
refreshController > refreshAccessToken returns 403 when refresh token verification fails
refreshController > issueCsrfToken issues a csrf token and cookie
requestDeduplicationMiddleware > should return cached response when the same request is repeated within the window
requestDeduplicationMiddleware > should forward the request to the handler when the hash is new
requestDeduplicationMiddleware > should use a combination of user ID and content for the dedup key
requestSizeLimitMiddleware > should allow requests within the configured size limit
requestSizeLimitMiddleware > should return 413 when Content-Length exceeds the limit
requestSizeLimitMiddleware > should allow requests without a Content-Length header
requestTimeoutMiddleware > resolveRequestTimeoutMs extends PDF export routes
requestTimeoutMiddleware > sends a timeout response when the timer fires
resumeController > getAllResumes > should return all resumes for the authenticated user
resumeController > getAllResumes > should return an empty array when the user has no resumes
resumeController > getResumeById > should return the resume when the ID belongs to the user
resumeController > getResumeById > should return 404 when the resume does not exist
resumeController > createResume > should create a resume with valid data and return 201
resumeController > createResume > should return 401 when the user is not authenticated
resumeController > updateResume > should update and return the resume when valid data is provided
resumeController > updateResume > should return 404 when the resume does not exist
resumeController > deleteResume > should delete the resume and return 204
resumeController > deleteResume > should return 404 when the resume does not exist
resumeDownloadController > downloadResume > should enqueue a download job and return its ID
resumeDownloadController > downloadResume > should return 500 when the resume does not exist
resumeDownloadController > getResumeDownloadJobStatus > should return the job status when the job exists
resumeDownloadController > getResumeDownloadJobStatus > should return 404 when the job ID is unknown
resumeDownloadController > streamResumeDownloadJobEvents > should open an SSE connection and emit status changes
resumeDownloadController > downloadResumeResult > should serve the PDF file when the job is completed
resumeDownloadController > downloadResumeResult > should return 404 when the job is not found
resumeEnhancementController > analyzeAts > should enqueue an ATS analysis and return the analysis ID
resumeEnhancementController > analyzeAts > should return 404 when the resume is not found
resumeEnhancementController > getLatestAtsAnalysis > should return the most recent ATS analysis for the resume
resumeEnhancementController > getLatestAtsAnalysis > should return 404 when no analysis exists
resumeEnhancementController > restoreResumeVersion > should restore a previous version of the resume
resumeEnhancementController > restoreResumeVersion > should return 404 when the version does not exist
emailSchema > validates a correct email
emailSchema > rejects an invalid email
emailSchema > rejects empty string
emailSchema > trims and lowercases email
emailSchema > rejects email exceeding max length
templateController > listPublicTemplates requests published tech templates
templateController > createTemplate normalizes tags and tech category fields
tokenBlacklist > isTokenBlacklisted > returns false when Redis is unavailable (avoids mass logout)
tokenBlacklist > isTokenBlacklisted > returns true when token is blacklisted
tokenBlacklist > isTokenBlacklisted > returns false when token is not blacklisted
tokenBlacklist > blacklistAccessToken > stores the token hash in Redis with TTL
tokenBlacklist > blacklistRefreshToken > stores the token hash in Redis with TTL for 8 days
validate > should call next() when validation passes
validate > should return 400 with error details when validation fails
validateRequest > calls next and applies parsed body for valid input
validateRequest > returns 400 with formatted errors for invalid body
validateRequest > parses params and query schemas
AiUsage model > should record AI usage with provider and token counts
AiUsage model > should validate the provider enum
AiUsage model > should calculate cost based on provider pricing
AiUsage model > should mark fallback attempts
AtsAnalysis model > should create an analysis with scores and keyword matches
AtsAnalysis model > should enforce unique jobId per analysis
AtsAnalysis model > should validate status transitions
AtsAnalysis model > should store section-level scores
AuditLog model > should create an audit entry with action and changes
AuditLog model > should validate the action enum
AuditLog model > should store old and new values for updates
AuditLog model > should have a TTL index on createdAt
Jobs model > should create a job listing with recruiter and title
Jobs model > should support text search across title, company, and description
Jobs model > should store skills as an array of strings
Mongoose plugins > auditTrailPlugin > should create an AuditLog entry on create
Mongoose plugins > auditTrailPlugin > should create an AuditLog entry on update
Mongoose plugins > auditTrailPlugin > should create an AuditLog entry on delete
Mongoose plugins > auditTrailPlugin > should include the user ID from async context
Mongoose plugins > softDeletePlugin > should set deletedAt on soft delete
Mongoose plugins > softDeletePlugin > should exclude soft-deleted documents from normal queries
Mongoose plugins > softDeletePlugin > should expose withDeleted() to include soft-deleted docs
Mongoose plugins > softDeletePlugin > should support restore()
Mongoose plugins > cascadeDeletePlugin > should delete child documents when parent is deleted
Mongoose plugins > cascadeDeletePlugin > should handle missing child collections gracefully
ResetToken model > should create a reset token with an expiry
ResetToken model > should auto-expire via TTL index
ResetToken model > should track resend attempts
Resume model > should create a resume with personal info and sections
Resume model > should validate section structure and field types
Resume model > should support variant linking via baseResumeId
Resume model > should store ATS scores and analysis metadata
Resume model > should have timestamps enabled
ResumeDownloadJob model > should create a download job with status queued
ResumeDownloadJob model > should store the generated PDF as Buffer
ResumeDownloadJob model > should track attempt count and last error
ResumeDownloadJob model > should transition through statuses
ResumeVersion model > should create a versioned snapshot of a resume
ResumeVersion model > should auto-increment the version number per resume
ResumeVersion model > should reject duplicate version numbers for the same resume
Template model > should create a template with a unique layoutId
Template model > should reject duplicate layoutIds
Template model > should validate audience and category enums
Template model > should track publishedAt when status changes to published
Template model > should store CSS variable overrides
TemplateUsage model > should record daily template usage
TemplateUsage model > should enforce one record per template per day
TemplateUsage model > should increment usage counts atomically
User model > should create a user with valid email and password
User model > should hash the password before saving
User model > should reject duplicate emails
User model > should validate the role enum
User model > should support Google OAuth linking
User model > should track login attempts and lock the account
User model > should support MFA configuration fields
aiService > fingerprintText > should return a consistent SHA-1 hash for the same input
aiService > fingerprintText > should return different hashes for different inputs
aiService > fingerprintText > should normalize whitespace before hashing
aiService > fingerprintText > should handle null/undefined as empty string
aiService > improveText fallback behavior > should return a fallback rewrite even when AI calls fail
aiService > enhanceBullet fallback behavior > should return a fallback enhancement even when AI calls fail
admin operations integration > should reject admin routes for non-admin users
admin operations integration > should list, create, update, and delete templates as admin
admin operations integration > should update template status and premium flags
admin operations integration > should return dashboard analytics
AI features integration > should improve text via the AI endpoint
AI features integration > should analyze ATS and return a score
AI features integration > should reject AI requests without authentication
AI features integration > should reject excessively long input text
auth integration > auth signup and login flows work end to end
auth integration > resume CRUD works for an authenticated user
health check integration > should return 200 OK from /health
health check integration > should return 200 OK from /api/health
health check integration > should include service version and uptime
health check integration > should return deep health status when available
resume CRUD integration > should create a resume, list it, read it, update it, and delete it
resume CRUD integration > should reject creating a resume without authentication
resume CRUD integration > should return 404 for a non-existent resume
resume CRUD integration > should not list another user's resumes
resume CRUD integration > should verify the resume is soft-deleted after delete
aiCredits > assertAiCreditsAvailable > should resolve when credits are available
aiCredits > assertAiCreditsAvailable > should throw when credits are exhausted and enforcement is on
aiCredits > assertAiCreditsAvailable > should log a warning when credits are low
aiCredits > deductAiCredits > should decrement the user's remaining credits
aiCredits > deductAiCredits > should update the reset timestamp
aiCredits > refreshAiCreditsIfNeeded > should reset credits when the reset time has passed
aiCredits > refreshAiCreditsIfNeeded > should not reset credits when the reset time is in the future
apiResponse > sendSuccess > should send a 200 JSON response with the data
apiResponse > sendSuccess > should include the CSRF token in the response body when provided
apiResponse > sendCreated > should send a 201 JSON response
apiResponse > sendBadRequest > should send a 400 response with error details
apiResponse > sendUnauthorized > should send a 401 response
apiResponse > sendServerError > should send a 500 response and log the error
atsPromptTemplates > should load the system prompt from the file when available
atsPromptTemplates > should fall back to the hardcoded default when the file is missing
atsPromptTemplates > should interpolate resume content into the user prompt
atsPromptTemplates > should include target keywords in the keyword analysis prompt
authCookies > setAccessTokenCookie > should set expected auth cookie attributes
authCookies > setAccessTokenCookie > should use SameSite=None for secure auth cookies
authCookies > setCsrfCookie > should return token and set non-HttpOnly cookie (JS-readable for double-submit)
authCookies > setAuthCookies > should set access, refresh, and csrf cookies
authCookies > clearAuthCookies > should clear auth and csrf cookies
businessMetrics > recordUserSignup > should increment the signup counter
businessMetrics > recordUserSignup > should record the signup method
businessMetrics > recordLogin > should increment the login success counter
businessMetrics > recordLoginFailure > should increment the login failure counter
businessMetrics > recordResumeCreated > should increment the resume created counter
controllerObservability > startControllerSpan > should create and return a new span with controller name
controllerObservability > markSpanSuccess > should set the span status to OK
controllerObservability > markSpanError > should record the error and set span status to ERROR
wrapController > should call the controller function and mark success
wrapController > should call onError and send error response when controller throws
wrapController > should not send error response if headers already sent
wrapController > should use function name as span name when no options given
wrapController > should accept string as span name
cookieParser > returns empty object when cookie header is missing
cookieParser > decodes keys and values and preserves equals signs
creditCalculator > should return the correct credit cost for improve-text operation
creditCalculator > should scale credit cost with input text length
creditCalculator > should return 0 for unknown operation types
creditCalculator > should floor at minimum credit cost for very short inputs
dailyUsage > reserveDailyUsage > should allow usage when under limit
dailyUsage > reserveDailyUsage > should throw 429 when daily limit is exceeded
dailyUsage > reserveDailyUsage > should allow ATS score usage when under limit of 2
dailyUsage > reserveDailyUsage > should throw 429 when ATS score limit of 2 is exceeded
dailyUsage > reserveDailyUsage > should use findOneAndUpdate with aggregation pipeline
dailyUsage > getDailyUsage > should return current day usage counts
dailyUsage > getDailyUsage > should return zeros when no usage record exists
dailyUsage > getDailyUsage > should return zeros when date is stale (previous day)
errorResponse > maps validation errors to a structured payload
errorResponse > maps not found errors to 404
errorResponse > maps auth errors with explicit codes
generateToken > signs token with access secret
generateToken > signs token with refresh secret and long ttl
google > verifyGoogleToken > should return the user payload when the Google token is valid
google > verifyGoogleToken > should throw when the audience does not match the client ID
google > verifyGoogleToken > should throw when the token is expired
hashToken > returns deterministic 64-char sha256 hex
hashToken > returns different hashes for different values
hashUtils > createTextHash > should produce a consistent hash for the same text
hashUtils > createTextHash > should produce different hashes for different text
hashUtils > createTextHash > should handle empty strings
MemoryLRUCache > should store and retrieve values by key
MemoryLRUCache > should evict the least-recently-used entry when at capacity
MemoryLRUCache > should return null for missing keys
MemoryLRUCache > should return expired entries as null
MemoryLRUCache > should delete existing keys
MemoryLRUCache > should clear all entries
MemoryLRUCache > should respect the configured TTL
MemoryLRUCache > should delete keys by glob pattern
MemoryLRUCache > should report correct size
MemoryLRUCache > cleanup removes all expired entries
MemoryLRUCache > startCleanup/stopCleanup manage the periodic timer
memoryCache singleton > is an instance of MemoryLRUCache
memoryCache singleton > has a positive max size from env
memoryRateLimit > should allow requests within the configured limit
memoryRateLimit > should reject requests that exceed the limit
memoryRateLimit > should reset after the configured window
memoryRateLimit > should return remaining count on each consume
mongooseModelResolver > getModelIfRegistered > should return the model when it is registered
mongooseModelResolver > getModelIfRegistered > should return null for unregistered model names
mongooseModelResolver > resolveModelByCollection > should return the model matching the collection name
mongooseModelResolver > resolveModelByCollection > should return null when no model matches the collection
redactSensitive > should redact password fields
redactSensitive > should redact token and secret fields
redactSensitive > should leave non-sensitive fields unchanged
redactSensitive > should handle deeply nested sensitive fields
redactSensitive > should return a copy without mutating the original
redis > getCacheProvider > should return 'none' when USE_MEMORY_ONLY_CACHE is true
redis > setCache > should store a value with TTL via memory fallback
redis > setCache > should serialize objects to JSON
redis > getCache > should return the cached value when it exists
redis > getCache > should return null for a cache miss
redis > consumeRateLimit > should use memory rate limiter when provider is none
redis > closeRedisClient > should resolve without error when no client exists
Redis provider integration > should detect Redis as the active provider
Redis provider integration > should cache and retrieve values via Redis
Redis provider integration > should return null for missing cache keys
Redis provider integration > should cache JSON-serializable values
Redis provider integration > should overwrite existing cache entries
Redis provider integration > should consume rate limit and return incremented count
Redis provider integration > should handle independent rate limit keys separately
Redis provider integration > should delete cache entries by pattern
Redis provider integration > should use Redis client for get/set operations
Redis provider integration > should use Lua EVAL for rate limiting
resumeTemplate > normalizeResumeTemplateId > maps legacy template labels to current ids
resumeTemplate > normalizeResumeTemplateId > falls back to classic for removed unknown templates
resumeTemplate > schemas > createResumeSchema accepts github in personal info
resumeTemplate > schemas > updateResumeSchema accepts legacy template ids and github-only updates
resumeTemplate > schemas > createTemplateSchema accepts the new audience split
resumeTemplate > schemas > publicTemplateListQuerySchema accepts audience filters
sanitize > sanitizeText > should remove HTML tags from text
sanitize > sanitizeText > should preserve safe characters
sanitize > sanitizeText > should handle empty strings
sanitize > stripScriptTags > should remove script tags and their content
secretsRotation > generateSecret > should generate a cryptographically random secret of the specified length via signWithRotation
secretsRotation > validateSecret > should return true for a validly formatted secret via verifyWithRotation
secretsRotation > validateSecret > should return false for an empty secret
securityLogger > logAuthFailure > should log an auth failure with reason and IP
securityLogger > logLoginAttempt > should log login attempts with success or failure
securityLogger > logSuspiciousActivity > should log suspicious activity with details
securityLogger > logAdminAction > should log admin actions with the admin user ID
securityLogger > logCsrfFailure > should log CSRF validation failures
sendEmail > should resolve without error
sendPasswordResetEmail > should resolve without error
tokenBlacklist > blacklistToken > should store the token with a TTL matching its original expiry
tokenBlacklist > isTokenBlacklisted > should return true when the token is blacklisted
tokenBlacklist > isTokenBlacklisted > should return false when the token is not blacklisted
tokenBlacklist > isTokenBlacklisted > should return false for expired blacklisted entries
tokenCounter > should calculate cost based on input and output tokens
tokenCounter > should use the correct pricing per provider
tokenCounter > should return 0 for zero tokens
tokenCounter > should round to 6 decimal places
transactionHelper > withTransaction > should execute the callback within a transaction
transactionHelper > withTransaction > should commit the transaction on success
transactionHelper > withTransaction > should abort the transaction on error
transactionHelper > withTransaction > should retry on transient transaction errors
